statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); git_info=""; if git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [[ -n "$branch" ]]; then if ! git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks diff --quiet 2>/dev/null || ! git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then dirty="*"; else dirty=""; fi; git_info=" ($branch$dirty)"; fi; fi; user=$(whoami); host=$(hostname -s); ctx=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); tokens=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_tokens // empty'); ctx_str=""; if [[ -n "$ctx" && -n "$tokens" ]]; then if [[ "$tokens" -ge 1000000 ]]; then tk=$(printf "%.1fM" "$(echo "$tokens / 1000000" | bc -l)"); elif [[ "$tokens" -ge 1000 ]]; then tk=$(printf "%.0fk" "$(echo "$tokens / 1000" | bc -l)"); else tk="$tokens"; fi; ctx_str=$(printf " [%s|%.0f%%]" "$tk" "$ctx"); fi; printf "\033[38;5;32m%s\033[38;5;75m%s\033[0m \033[38;5;245m%s@%s\033[38;5;214m%s\033[0m" "$cwd" "$git_info" "$user" "$host" "$ctx_str"
